instruction: Could you play the music video that's saved on my desktop for me via vlc?
config: _download_setup(files=[{'url': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/vlc/59f21cfb-0120-4326-b255-a5b827b38967/Rick%20Astley%20-%20Never%20Gonna%20Give%20You%20Up%20%28Official%20Music%20Video%29.mp4', 'path': '/home/user/Desktop/Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Official Music Video).mp4'}])

evaluator.eval: is_vlc_playing(get_vlc_playing_info(env, config={'dest': 'status.xml'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'type': 'file_name', 'file_name': 'Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up (Official Music Video).mp4'}}))
